description: Material Passport for Stage 4 — Report Generation. Tracks all artifacts produced during statistical report compilation, TFL generation, and CONSORT/STROBE compliance.

required_artifacts.name: 统计报告
required_artifacts.description: Complete statistical report including methods, results, and interpretation sections.

required_artifacts.name: 统计表格
required_artifacts.description: All completed tables: baseline characteristics, efficacy results, safety results, subgroup analyses.

required_artifacts.name: 统计图表
required_artifacts.description: All completed figures: CONSORT/STROBE flow diagrams, forest plots, KM curves, bar charts.

required_artifacts.name: 数据列表
required_artifacts.description: Detailed data listings: individual patient data summaries, adverse event listings.

required_artifacts.name: CONSORT/STROBE清单
required_artifacts.description: Completed reporting guideline checklist with page references for each item.

required_artifacts.name: 安全性摘要
required_artifacts.description: Summary of safety findings: treatment-emergent AEs, SAEs, deaths, discontinuations.

required_artifacts.name: 关键发现摘要
required_artifacts.description: Concise summary of primary and key secondary findings with clinical interpretation.

optional_artifacts.name: 附录材料
optional_artifacts.description: Supplementary tables, additional analyses, and technical appendices.

optional_artifacts.name: 审稿意见回复
optional_artifacts.description: Point-by-point responses to prior review comments.

quality_gates.name: 报告指南合规性
quality_gates.description: All applicable CONSORT/STROBE/PRISMA/STARD checklist items are addressed.

quality_gates.name: 表格图表一致性
quality_gates.description: Numbers in tables match numbers in text; no discrepancies between sources.

quality_gates.name: 统计结果准确性
quality_gates.description: Reported p-values, CIs, and effect sizes match the analysis execution outputs.

quality_gates.name: 安全性数据完整性
quality_gates.description: All safety data are presented; no missing safety tables.
